---
title: "weighted_overtime_trend_dataset"
format: html
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)

joined_dataset <- read.csv("combined_attendance.csv")

weighted_overtime_trend <- joined_dataset |>
  rename(
    School_Name = School.Name,
    School_Code = School.Code,
    Attendance_Rate = Attendance.Rate,
    Average_Absences = Average...of.Absences,
    Chronic_Absent_10pct = Chronically.Absent..10..or.more.
  ) |>
  group_by(school_year, COUNTY) |>
  summarize(
    total_students = sum(School_Total, na.rm = TRUE),
    
    attendance_rate_weighted =
      sum(Attendance_Rate * School_Total, na.rm = TRUE) / total_students,
    
    avg_absences_weighted =
      sum(Average_Absences * School_Total, na.rm = TRUE) / total_students,
    
    chronic_10pct_weighted =
      sum(Chronic_Absent_10pct * School_Total, na.rm = TRUE) / total_students,
    
    num_schools = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

weighted_overtime_trend_long <- weighted_overtime_trend |>
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(attendance_rate_weighted, avg_absences_weighted, chronic_10pct_weighted),
    names_to = "Variable",
    values_to = "Value"
  ) |>
  mutate(
    Variable = recode(
      Variable,
      attendance_rate_weighted = "Attendance Rate",
      avg_absences_weighted = "Average # Absences",
      chronic_10pct_weighted = "10% Chronic Absenteeism"
    )
  )

write.csv(weighted_overtime_trend_long, "weighted_overtime_trend_long.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```
